document_title: Next Breakthroughs in Agentic Coding: Technologies, Market Trends, and Costing

reference.notes: Anthropic 2026 Agentic Coding Trends Report selected as structural exemplar; complemented with vendor pricing pages and independent analyses. Section 04 updated with a sourced component taxonomy and a compact vendor-mapped table (2026-03-20).

sections.title: Executive summary and key findings
sections.summary: Topline findings, recommended action areas, and the five candidate breakthrough points.

sections.title: Agentic coding landscape: platforms, models, and developer workflows
sections.summary: Map of current platforms, agent capabilities, and how developers use agentic workflows.

sections.title: Top five agentic-coding platforms — feature and cost overview
sections.summary: Listings and short profiles of the top 5 platforms, with direct pricing links and a cost breakdown plan.
sections.evidence_plan: Use vendor pricing pages (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, GitHub/Copilot, Cursor/Replit) and vendor docs.
sections.table_plan: Create a table listing each platform, core components, and pricing URL.
sections.notes: Section 02 completed: capability mapping and features matrix. Section 03 has been updated with representative public figures and direct pricing links.

sections.title: Important components and per-component cost taxonomy
sections.summary: Define components (model tokens, tool calls, container sessions, storage, IDE seats) and show typical cost ranges.
sections.table_plan: Table of component definitions and mapping to pricing lines; candidate data source: OpenAI pricing page as canonical example.
sections.notes: Section updated 2026-03-20 with a sourced component table mapping each component to a canonical vendor pricing line (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, GitHub, Cursor). Section marked done after audit: contains vendor-traceable lines, a compact mapping table, and buyer implications. Remaining verification: validate representative workload totals in Section 05.

sections.title: Detailed cost breakdowns for each top platform
sections.summary: Per-platform detailed cost breakdowns with direct citations to public pricing pages.
sections.evidence_plan: Gather official pricing pages; avoid estimating unlisted costs; where data missing, record gaps.

sections.title: Where the next breakthroughs will come from
sections.summary: Synthesize technical and market trends to identify top-five breakthrough areas with rationale and trade-offs.

sections.title: Risks, governance, and adoption considerations
sections.summary: Security, safety, compliance, and organizational adoption barriers.

sections.title: Recommendations for product teams and investors
sections.summary: Concrete next steps, prioritized experiments, and suggested KPIs.

special_instructions.instruction: We need to have detailed cost breakdown for every top agentic coding platform (with direct source to their public pricing page).
